texto: The universe had an odd sense of fairness; it took away things one did not want to give up, and then gave things one did not ask for.

texto: Unfounded gossip can turn into sanctioned history if falls into the hands of the right storyteller.
explicacao: Citação de Laila Lalami sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Unfounded gossip can turn into sanctioned history if falls into the hands of the right storyteller.” articula reflexao, gossip, unfounded em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Telling a story is like sowing a seed—you always hope to see it become a beautiful tree, with firm roots and branches that soar up in the sky. But it is a peculiar sowing, for you will never know whether your seed sprouts or dies.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laila Lalami: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Telling a story is like sowing a seed—you always hope to see it become a beautiful tree, with fir…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, storytelling, sowing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Telling a story is like sowing a seed—you always hope to see it become a beautiful tree, with firm roots and branches that soar up in the sky. But it is a peculiar sowing, for you will never know whether your seed sprouts or dies.

texto: His anger took many shapes: sometimes soft and familiar, like a round stone he had caressed for so long that is was perfectly smooth and polished; sometimes it was thin and sharp like a blade that could slice through anything; sometimes it had the form of a star, radiating his hatred in all directions, leaving him numb and empty inside.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laila Lalami: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “His anger took many shapes: sometimes soft and familiar, like a round stone he had caressed for s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, anger, hatred pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hatred.
